subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth from the presence of the Wronged One unto him who hath believed in the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. Thou hast attained unto recognition of the Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی المظلوم الی الذی آمن بالمهیمن القیوم قد فزت بعرفان الظهور
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
